title: Whipped Citrus American Soya Bean Toast
description: A fluffy, citrusy toast topped with whipped soya bean puree, perfect for a bright, egg-free breakfast.
instructions: Squeeze the juice from the lemon and orange into a bowl and set aside.
Whisk the soya bean puree with the citrus juices until smooth and creamy.
Add maple syrup, vanilla extract, and sea salt to the mixture and beat until fluffy.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and drizzle olive oil.
Place the sourdough slices in the skillet and toast each side until golden brown.
Spread the whipped soya bean topping generously over the warm toast.
Sprinkle extra lemon zest on top for added brightness.
Serve immediately, optionally garnishing with microgreens.
